mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications(user_id, type, title, content, related_id, is_read, read_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedId}, #{isRead}, #{readTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
